text: MetaboDirect is uniquely able to automatically generate biochemical transformation networks based on mass differences.
source_excerpt:
MetaboDirect is also uniquely able to automatically generate
biochemical transformation networks (ab initio) based on mass differences

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect
super_pattern.object: ab initio networks based on mass differences

text: MetaboDirect consists of 6 major steps: data pre-processing, data diagnostics, data exploration, chemodiversity analysis, statistical analysis, and transformation network analysis.
source_excerpt:
The MetaboDirect pipeline consists of 6 major steps/
categories (Fig. 1): (i) data pre-processing, (ii) data
diagnostics, (iii) data exploration, (iv) chemodiversity
analysis, (v) statistical analysis, and (vi) transformation
network analysis

text: MetaboDirect uses mass difference network-based approach to generate molecular transformation networks.
source_excerpt: in the different samples and edges represent the putative

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect transformation networks
super_pattern.relation: based on mass differences between peaks

text: Mass differences with a maximum error of 1 ppm are kept as putative mass-based transformations in MetaboDirect.
source_excerpt:
Mass differences with a maximum error of 1 ppm
against the reference biochemical transformation keys
are kept as a putative mass-based transformation, as such
small differences are unlikely to be observed by chance,
and thus, they may have chemical significance

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect mass difference detection
super_pattern.object: 1 ppm maximum error for transformation assignment

text: The most abundant chemical transformation in the bacterium-phage data set was methylation.
source_excerpt: tion was methylation (i.e., loss or gain of a methyl group).
